notes: Carey now supports remote LoRA selection in complete and cover mode, with LoRA-specific caption pools served from the remote backend.
LoRA functionality is still remote-backend only in this release. On localhost, complete and cover dice fall back to the built-in caption pools.
Cover mode now includes the same xl-turbo / xl-base experiment path as complete mode.
Close your DAW before replacing plugin files with a downloaded update.
